clause_matrix_rows.justification: Applicable because design pressure is defined for pressure boundary sizing.
Applicable because design temperature is defined for material selection limits.
Applicable because corrosion allowance input is provided.
Applicable because cylindrical shell thickness under internal pressure must be verified.
Not applicable because external pressure service is not declared and internal pressure basis is assumed.
Applicable because head thickness under internal pressure must be verified.
Applicable because nozzle openings require reinforcement-area replacement checks against parent components.
Applicable because nozzle neck minimum thickness must be verified.
Not applicable because design temperature is above low-temperature impact-test threshold.
